model_info.dis_text: In May 2001, Liu Xiang won his first international 110m hurdles race in Japan. In 2004, he won the first Olympic gold medal for China in the 110m hurdles race, and at the same time broke the Olympic Games record. It was also the first time an Olympic gold medal for hurdling was hung round the neck of a sportsperson from an Asian country. Liu Xiang trained very hard. In fact, he trained so hard that he hurt his foot. From 2008 on, he suffered a lot from his foot problem, but he did not give up.
model_info.real_text: In May two thousand and one, Liu Xiang won his first international one hundred and ten meter hurdles race in Japan. In two thousand and four, he won the first Olympic gold medal for China in the one hundred and ten meter hurdles race, and at the same time broke the Olympic Games record. It was also the first time an Olympic gold medal for hurdling was hung round the neck of a sportsperson from an Asian country. Liu Xiang trained very hard. In fact, he trained so hard that he hurt his foot. From two thousand and eight on, he suffered a lot from his foot problem, but he did not give up.

chap_info.intro_text: 听两段对话或独白，每段播放两遍。各段播放前你有10秒钟的阅题时间。各段播放后有两个问题。请根据所听到的问题和括号内的提示，选择正确的信息在8秒钟内口头回答每一个问题。
听第一段对话，回答第1-2两个问题。现在你有10秒钟的阅题时间。
听第二段对话，回答第3-4两个问题。现在你有10秒钟的阅题时间。

title.text:
M: Did you watch Steven's match yesterday?
W: No, I didn't. I was having a meeting at that time. How was the match?
M: It was exciting in the first period.
W: What do you mean? What about the last period?
M: Steven lost the game.
W: What a pity! I thought he would win.
M: Me, too. What was worse, he hurt his feet.

W: Do you know that many clubs in our school are looking for new members, Tony?
M: Yeah. I have heard the news.
W: Do you want to join one of them?
M: Sure. I want to join the football club. I like playing football.
W: That's a good idea. You play football very well. There you will meet many people that also like the sport.
M: Yes, that's true. And If I join the club, I will have the chance to take part in a football match.
W: That sounds good.
M: Well, what club do you want to join, Mary?
W: The dance club. I like dancing and I believe I will learn many things there.
M: That's great. Let's go to join the clubs.
W: OK. Let's go.

model_info.title_text: I am Paul. My favorite sport is basketball. It is very easy for me to play basketball. I want to become a famous basketball player in the future. I have two basketballs. One was bought by myself, and the other was given by my father last year. I play it three times a week with my classmates in my school. I feel very happy when I play basketball. I often take part in basketball games. There is going to be a basketball match against Class 9 next Friday. I hope our team will win the match.

model_info.title_text: I'm Jane. Our school held a sports meeting last Friday. Students arrived at the playground in the morning. I took part in the first event — the 100-meter race. My friend Lisa took part in the high jump at noon. The events in the afternoon were the 400-meter race, the bicycle race, the baseball game, the basketball game and the tennis game. My classmate Maria took part in the 400-meter race. But she fell down. Although Maria had the courage to finish the race, she was not going to break the record this time. All of the students were excited.
